scan_output: Single-rule scan failed for sshd_disable_rhosts (rule=xccdf_org.ssgproject.content_rule_sshd_disable_rhosts). Could not verify.

llm_verdict.message:
{
  "approved": true,
  "review_approved": true,
  "review_feedback": "target_file="/etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/00-complianceascode-hardening.conf"
if [ ! -f "$target_file" ]; then
    mkdir -p "$(dirname "$target_file")
    write_file "$target_file" "IgnoreRhosts yes"
else
    content=$(read_file "$target_file")
    found=0
    while IFS= read -r line; do
        line="${line#"${line%%[![:space:]]*}"}"
        line="${line%"${line##*[![:space:]]}"}"
        if [ "$line" = "IgnoreRhosts yes" ]; then
            found=1
            break
        fi
    done <<< "$content"
    if [ $found -eq 0 ]; then
        content="$content
IgnoreRhosts yes"
        write_file "$target_file" "$content"
    fi
fi",
  "review_concerns": [],
  "review_suggested_improvements": [],
  "review_security_score": 8,
  "qa_safe": true,
  "qa_verdict_reason": "The remediation sets IgnoreRhosts yes in sshd_config.d, which disables .rhosts support as intended to address the vulnerability without affecting core services.",
  "qa_side_effects": [],
  "qa_recommendation": "Approve",
  "instruction": "Plan approved. Proceed with run_cmd / read_file / write_file to apply the fix."
}
